name: UnresolvedFunctionException
summary: The exception that is thrown when definition for a custom node cannot be found

constructors.name: UnresolvedFunctionException(string)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.ZeroTouch.UnresolvedFunctionException class with the name of the custom node that causes this exception.

params.name: functionName
params.doc: User friendly name of custom node on UI.

properties.name: FunctionName
properties.summary: Returns user friendly name of not found custom node.
